[EXPERIMENTAL] Send a test ping to an organization webhook

## Synopsis

[EXPERIMENTAL] Send a test ping to an organization webhook.

Issues a test ping event to the specified webhook to verify it is
properly configured and reachable. Returns the delivery result
including the HTTP response code and duration.

```
pulumi org webhook ping <id> [flags]
```

## Examples

```
  # Ping a webhook
  pulumi org webhook ping 1a2b3c4d

  # Ping and get full delivery details as JSON
  pulumi org webhook ping 1a2b3c4d --output json
```

## Options

```
  -h, --help            help for ping
      --org string      The organization that owns the webhook. Defaults to the current org.
      --output string   Output format. Supported values are: default and json (default "default")
```

      --tracing file:                Emit tracing to the specified endpoint. Use the file: scheme to write tracing data to a local file
